rationale: Same PR as aider-Aider-AI-aider-pr5162; the collector picked it up from both seed entries (paul-gauthier/aider and Aider-AI/aider are the same upstream project, the org was renamed). Tree-sitter Julia grammar node renames and docs updates. The duplicate is itself a known issue worth flagging back to the seed-repos.json dedup logic, but the entry is clean as a PR.
